metadata.title: Server LM — Chat with your documents
metadata.description: Like NotebookLM, but for you and your entire organization. Server LM connects every person to the documents they need — and only those.

hero.eyebrow: Like NotebookLM, but for you and your entire organization
hero.descripcion: Server LM connects each person with their own data, or their company's data, to the documents they need — and only those. Like chatting with NotebookLM but with all your documents. An accountant talks to their invoices. A lawyer to their contracts. A manager to their reports. Each one sees their own, without manual filters or complex configurations.

conversacion.desc: Ask in plain language, get answers from your documents.

acceso.desc: Each user sees only what their role and area allow. No manual setup.

escala.desc: From an independent professional to a corporation with millions of documents.

nosotros.subtitulo: Server for service, LM for smart conversation
nosotros.descripcion: We have over 40 years of experience transforming value and successfully riding the waves of technology.

team.desc: For teams and departments that collaborate.

registro.subtitulo: No commitment. Cancel whenever you want.
registro.legal: By signing up you accept our terms of use. A payment method will be requested to activate your plan and you will not be charged during the trial period. You will only be charged (and notified) if you enter the system after the trial period ends.

footer.copyright: © {year} Server LM — Agencia AAS. All rights reserved.
